content_body: I must say, we were a bit worried on the gravel road to the cabin, then when we arrived, WOW!!! So much better than we even expected!!! Took my mother-in-law and our 3 teens for her 80th birthday, and I've never had such a beautifully stocked and furnished cabin. We've stayed in many in Pigeon Forge, Gatlinburg, and Blue Ridge, but this was the best of the best!!! Immaculate and so welcoming—we are definitely going to come back!!! Thanks for such a beautiful October getaway. My husband tried fly-fishing, and we enjoyed every moment by the fires and listening to the train. What a great vacation!!!
title: Fantastic and Better Than Imagined
